LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR RESPONDENT'S FAILURE TO ISSUE A VENDOR'S PERMIT/LICENSE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO EXHAUST ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES OR TO PRESENT ANY BASIS FOR GRANTING THE REQUESTED RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
